mapper.select: select pi.id as portfolio_item_id, pi.user_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.finnhub_symbol, s.logo_url, pi.daily_invest_amount, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo from portfolio_items pi join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where pi.user_id = #{userId} and pi.is_active = true order by pi.updated_at desc, pi.created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into recommendations ( user_id, portfolio_item_id, recommendation_date, recommendation_status, engine_score, confidence_score, current_amount, recommended_amount, final_note, engine_version, formula_version, raw_score, risk_adjustment, price_score, news_score, price_weight, news_weight, price_return_30d, news_sentiment_score, increase_eligible ) values ( #{command.userId}, #{command.portfolioItemId}, #{command.recommendationDate}, #{command.recommendationStatus}, #{command.engineScore}, #{command.confidenceScore}, #{command.currentAmount}, #{command.recommendedAmount}, #{command.finalNote}, #{command.engineVersion}, #{command.formulaVersion}, #{command.rawScore}, #{command.riskAdjustment}, #{command.priceScore}, #{command.newsScore}, #{command.priceWeight}, #{command.newsWeight}, #{command.priceReturn30d}, #{command.newsSentimentScore}, #{command.increaseEligible} )
mapper.update: update recommendations set recommendation_status = #{command.recommendationStatus}, engine_score = #{command.engineScore}, confidence_score = #{command.confidenceScore}, current_amount = #{command.currentAmount}, recommended_amount = #{command.recommendedAmount}, final_note = #{command.finalNote}, engine_version = #{command.engineVersion}, formula_version = #{command.formulaVersion}, raw_score = #{command.rawScore}, risk_adjustment = #{command.riskAdjustment}, price_score = #{command.priceScore}, news_score = #{command.newsScore}, price_weight = #{command.priceWeight}, news_weight = #{command.newsWeight}, price_return_30d = #{command.priceReturn30d}, news_sentiment_score = #{command.newsSentimentScore}, increase_eligible = #{command.increaseEligible} where id = #{command.recommendationId}
mapper.insert: insert into recommendation_evidence ( recommendation_id, evidence_type, title, body, score_impact, display_order ) values ( #{command.recommendationId}, #{command.evidenceType}, #{command.title}, #{command.body}, #{command.scoreImpact}, #{command.displayOrder} )

insert into news_analysis_cache ( stock_id, news_id, symbol, news_published_at, headline, summary, source_name, news_url, sentiment_label, sentiment_score, keyword_score, relevance_score, impact_level, reason, recency_weight, impact_weight, weighted_score, content_hash, analysis_batch_hash, llm_model, analyzed_at ) values ( #{command.stockId}, #{command.newsId}, #{command.symbol}, #{command.newsPublishedAt}, #{command.headline}, #{command.summary}, #{command.sourceName}, #{command.newsUrl}, #{command.sentimentLabel}, #{command.sentimentScore}, #{command.keywordScore}, #{command.relevanceScore}, #{command.impactLevel}, #{command.reason}, #{command.recencyWeight}, #{command.impactWeight}, #{command.weightedScore}, #{command.contentHash}, #{command.analysisBatchHash}, #{command.llmModel}, #{command.analyzedAt} ) on conflict (stock_id, content_hash) do update set sentiment_label = excluded.sentiment_label, sentiment_score = excluded.sentiment_score, keyword_score = excluded.keyword_score, relevance_score = excluded.relevance_score, impact_level = excluded.impact_level, reason = excluded.reason, recency_weight = excluded.recency_weight, impact_weight = excluded.impact_weight, weighted_score = excluded.weighted_score, analysis_batch_hash = excluded.analysis_batch_hash, llm_model = excluded.llm_model, analyzed_at = excluded.analyzed_at
mapper.select: select distinct on (r.portfolio_item_id) r.id as recommendation_id, r.portfolio_item_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.logo_url, r.recommendation_status, r.engine_score, r.confidence_score, r.current_amount, r.recommended_amount, r.final_note, r.engine_version, r.formula_version, r.raw_score, r.risk_adjustment, r.price_score, r.news_score, r.price_weight, r.news_weight, r.price_return_30d, r.news_sentiment_score, r.increase_eligible, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo from recommendations r join portfolio_items pi on pi.id = r.portfolio_item_id join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and pi.is_active = true order by r.portfolio_item_id, r.recommendation_date desc, r.created_at desc
select recommendation_id, evidence_type, title, body, score_impact, display_order from recommendation_evidence where recommendation_id = #{recommendationId} order by display_order asc, id asc

select stock_id, news_id, symbol, news_published_at, headline, summary, source_name, news_url, sentiment_label, sentiment_score, keyword_score, relevance_score, impact_level, reason, recency_weight, impact_weight, weighted_score, content_hash, analysis_batch_hash, llm_model, analyzed_at from news_analysis_cache where stock_id = #{stockId} and relevance_score >= 60 and (news_published_at at time zone 'Asia/Seoul')::date = ( case when extract(isodow from current_timestamp at time zone 'Asia/Seoul') in (6, 7) then ( select max((weekend_news.news_published_at at time zone 'Asia/Seoul')::date) from news_analysis_cache weekend_news where weekend_news.stock_id = #{stockId} and weekend_news.relevance_score >= 60 and (weekend_news.news_published_at at time zone 'Asia/Seoul')::date <= (current_timestamp at time zone 'Asia/Seoul')::date ) else (current_timestamp at time zone 'Asia/Seoul')::date end ) order by abs(weighted_score) desc nulls last, news_published_at desc nulls last limit 3
